architectReview.evidence: Leader audit confirms G003 stays national-average-only, uses the locked MAPE-only gate with degraded fallback, and keeps commentary rule-based with evidence lineage. Aggregate, forecast, and commentary modules typecheck cleanly and feed the live embedded-Postgres verifier without contract drift.

executorQa.evidence: Service-level verification passed for aggregates, forecast gate logic, commentary generation, and a full DB-backed verifier succeeded with embedded Postgres + Opinet ingest + FRED indicator sync + forecast + dashboard/export dataset generation.
e2eCommands: node --import tsx -e "import { buildSeriesSnapshot } from './src/lib/aggregates/index.ts'; /* aggregate smoke */"

node --import tsx -e "import { buildBaselineForecast } from './src/lib/forecast/build-baseline-forecast.ts'; import { evaluateMapeGate } from './src/lib/forecast/evaluate-mape-gate.ts'; /* forecast smoke */"
node --import tsx -e "import { runCommentaryPipeline } from './src/lib/commentary/index.ts'; /* commentary smoke */"
node --import tsx --input-type=module -e "embedded-postgres verifier for ingest + indicator sync + forecast + dashboard/export dataset"
redTeamCommands: Forecast verifier checks degraded approvalState path when MAPE is unavailable in the embedded-Postgres run.
Commentary verifier checks rule-based Korean text with dominant indicator evidence.
End-to-end verifier checks export dataset readiness and XLSX PK signature [80,75].

artifactRefs.description: Command-level verification log for G003 aggregate/forecast/commentary services and the embedded-Postgres verifier.

contractCoverage.obligation: Weekly/monthly aggregation is deterministic from national-average current truth rows.
Forecast pipeline emits 4 weekly + 3 monthly points and enforces the MAPE-only gate with degraded fallback.
Commentary remains rule-based, Korean, and evidence-backed from the approved indicator set.

adversarialCases.scenario: Cross-week and cross-month daily truth sample
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Weekly and monthly builders must emit deterministic counts and averages.

adversarialCases.scenario: Embedded-Postgres run with insufficient weekly history for MAPE
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Forecast remains available with degraded approvalState and still emits 4 weekly + 3 monthly points.

adversarialCases.scenario: Indicator set Dubai/Brent/WTI/USD-KRW with rising pressures
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Rule-based Korean commentary text and four indicator signals are emitted.

iteration.evidence: G003 modules were implemented, typechecked, verified in isolation, then re-verified in a live embedded-Postgres stack that exercised ingest, indicator sync, forecast, and downstream dataset generation together.
